texto: His words were soft and broken against her lips, “Alexis, I will not lie to you. I want you more than I have ever wanted anyone in my life but I will not take you like this. I will wait for you. I will wait as long as it takes. I want you to be ready, to be at peace with your decision. But for the love of God, you have got to stop looking at me like that, or my resolve will fail me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sophia Byron: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “His words were soft and broken against her lips, “Alexis, I will not lie to you. I want you more …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, romance-novels, romance-sexy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de romance-sexy.
